MASTER CALENDAR COURT

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-08-2015 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Feb-18-2015 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-26-2014 Continued To Feb-18-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-15-2014 Sustained
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Atty. KENDALL A. LAYNE of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith, LLLP, Tel No. (415) 438-5904 appearing for Defendants Joel K. Belway, and The Law Office of Joel K. Belway;
No other appearances made on this matter.

RULING - Matter was not argued. Court and counsel discussed typographical error in the court's tentative ruling The Court modified its tentative ruling to correct a typographical error, and ruled as follows: DEFENDANTS JOEL K. BELWAY, AND THE LAW OFFICE OF JOEL K. BELWAY'S DEMURRER TO THE SECOND AND SIXTH CAUSES OF ACTION OF THE COMPLAINT. The demurrer to the negligence per se "cause of action" is sustained without leave to amend. Negligence per se is an evidentiary doctrine, not a stand alone cause of action. See Quiroz v. Seventh Ave. Center (2006) 140 Cal.App.4th 1256, 1285. The demurrer to the equitable indemnity cause of action is sustained without leave to amend. It is erroneous to characterize Mr. Adler and defendant as joint tortfeasors. The $165,000 payment is a component of plaintiff's claimed damages for defendant's alleged malpractice. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/EHG).

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-10-2014 Continued To Jan-07-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-17-2014 Continued To Dec-15-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANTS JOEL BELWAY, THE LAW OFFICE OF JOEL K. BELWAY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to December 15, 2014 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6C. Moving party must deliver a courtesy copy of the operative complaint to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than November 17, 2014, or the motion may be denied. Judge: Peter J. Busch; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
